    "R1.5": "The output does not propose a coherent end-to-end section plan but rather provides detailed feedback on the introduction's content and structure.",

    "RX.1": "All output is presented as equally confident without explicit uncertainty disclosure for any of the flagged issues.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested; it focuses on detailed feedback rather than reorganizing or rewriting sections.",
    "RX.4": "Identifies several overclaims and risks but does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The output does not trace any of the non-cosmetic changes made to the text."

  "confidence": {

    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,

  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.5: The output does not propose a coherent end-to-end section plan but rather provides detailed feedback on the introduction's content and structure.
rationale.R1.6: Improves several paragraphs by clarifying arguments and providing context, though it introduces some new claims that are not directly supported by the artifact.
rationale.RX.1: All output is presented as equally confident without explicit uncertainty disclosure for any of the flagged issues.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested; it focuses on detailed feedback rather than reorganizing or rewriting sections.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies several overclaims and risks but does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not trace any of the non-cosmetic changes made to the text.
